_comment: Ranker-regression expectations over data/seed.json + data/cooccurrence.json. CHARACTERIZATION values (what the deterministic engine produces for the default JOURNEY archetype at the trust>=0.50 gate), not hand-picked winners. Update deliberately when the seed, co-occurrence, or scoring changes, and record why. History: science subgraph -> Mithra; Hellenistic-India-Buddhism bridge (0011); default cap cut 6->4 (0012); breadth clusters Greece (0016), Egypt (0017), Islamic Golden Age (0018). At cap 4 the winners are Roman Empire -> Rigveda (India a near-tie, ~0.04 wow behind, nudged over by the Islamic cluster's Baghdad->Silk Road edge shifting predicate rarity), Christianity -> Alexander the Great (leads ~1.3), and Euclid -> Buddhism (leads ~2.3). Re-characterise after any seed/co-occurrence/scoring change.
